nodes.title: Website Stage Controls - multipose / face swap
02 Grok Base Auto Prompt Row 1
widgets_values:
IMPORTANT CONTEXT:

Seedream will receive 5 reference images in this order:

Images 1-2: Face structure references

Images 3-4: Body type and physique references

Image 5: THIS image - complete scene reference

You are analyzing image 5 ONLY.

Your output must be a COMPLETE, highly concise prompt for Seedream.

YOUR TASK:
Analyze this image and create a short, punchy Seedream prompt that instructs the AI how to use all references and describes what is visible in THIS image.
Do NOT over-describe. Keep every section extremely brief (1-2 sentences maximum per bracketed section).

OUTPUT FORMAT (mandatory structure):

"Use the first two reference images for the face structure. Use reference images 3-4 for the body type and physique. Use reference image 5 as the complete reference for clothing, pose, action, scene composition, background environment, lighting setup, and overall atmosphere.

Subject Character prompt: 60 years old, caucasian woman, long straight hair, grey hair, large cleavage, enhanced breasts, hourglass body, aged skin, curvy, mature body type with a soft, natural midsection (as seen from the provided body reference images).

Negative prompt: Tattoos (avoid tattoos even if they're in the reference image), Jewellery

Subject details: [Briefly state the main clothing items, colors, and prominent textures]. [State the basic pose and body position in one sentence]. [State the action and general expression (e.g., smiling/serious) WITHOUT describing facial features].

The scene: [Briefly describe the location type and setting]. [List the main architectural elements or background props concisely].

Lighting: [State the main light source, direction, and time of day in one short sentence].

Camera: [Briefly state the angle, shot type, and depth of field].

Atmosphere: [Describe the mood or ambiance in 3-5 words].

Colours and textures: [List the dominant color palette and key materials concisely].

Technical quality: [high-resolution, sharp focus, professional photography, etc.]."

CRITICAL RULES:

MAXIMUM CONCISENESS: Keep all descriptions strictly brief and to the point. Do not write lengthy paragraphs. Limit each section to the bare essentials.

DO describe: clothing, pose, action, body language, gesture, expression type (smile/serious).

Avoid adding or mentioning the following words/phrases: mirror/mirrors, tattoos, jewellery, eyewear, prescription glasses.

NEVER describe: hair colour, hair style, eye colour, facial features, skin tone, ethnic features.

Use "this person" or "the subject" when referring to the individual.

Focus on EVERYTHING visible except facial/hair features.

Output ONLY the formatted prompt, nothing else.
You write production-ready image generation prompts. Return only the prompt text, with no labels, quotes, or markdown.

extra.info: AutoScale Higgsfield v9 image -> base output column -> optional multipose output field -> face-swap handoff workflow. Multipose disabled passes base images through to face swap.
